business_ideas.idea: AI agency of virtual people—own IP/avatars that become the most famous digital personas, competing as if they were real people
Capons Chop House expansion: open 50 Ruth's Chris-style steakhouse locations in high-net-worth neighborhoods globally with focus on food quality

predictions.text: Live shopping will be 10-15% of all commerce within 6-10 years; currently ~25-30% of market is e-com, live shopping will mirror that transition
VeeFriends will become Pokémon-level IP; one of most valuable intellectual properties in world within 20 years
Individual empire model (creator-entrepreneurs like Kylie, Alex Cooper, Gary V) will become the next Fortune 500 companies
